summary: Workflow is incomplete and cannot execute. References src/validator.test.ts and fixtures/ files not provided, causing immediate failure in act. TypeScript code is well-typed with proper error handling, but assert-report.ts hardcodes expected values (lines with 'Expected 1 expired', 'Expected DB_PASSWORD', etc.), inflexible for multiple test cases. Redundant validator invocations at lines 46-51 and 53-57 lack explanatory comments. prepare-config.ts has no error handling (line 8 reads unchecked). Design assumes fixtures exist but doesn't provision them. Actionlint validation status unknown—not confirmed as passed per task requirements.
